## Summary / 变更摘要


## Tests / 测试

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q xdownloader.py xdownloader_app`
- [ ] Frontend JavaScript syntax check if `xdownloader_app/index.html` changed

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] No `config.json`, cookies, tokens, downloaded media, logs, release artifacts, or private paths are committed.
- [ ] User-facing text is updated in both English and Chinese when needed.
- [ ] Runtime code remains under `xdownloader_app/`.
- [ ] Installer or upgrade behavior is documented if changed.
